name: Thonburi Medical Centre Public Company Limited
summary: Thonburi Medical Centre Public Company Limited engages in the hospital business in Thailand. It offers services in the areas of hair loss, weight loss and gain, sexual health, facial treatment, and beauty and cosmetic surgery, as well as eyebrows, mustache, beard, and sideburns growth. The company was formerly known as Krungdhon Hospital Public Company Limited and changed its name to Thonburi Medical Centre Public Company Limited in April 2013. Thonburi Medical Centre Public Company Limited was founded in 1977 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
